headline: Is General Dynamics (GD) Offering An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if General Dynamics at around US$313 per share is priced for opportunity or already reflecting the story that matters to you as a shareholder? The stock has pulled back recently, with a 6.9% decline over the last week and a 9.7% decline over the last month, while still showing a 17.3% return over the past year and 83.2% over five years. Recently, investor attention has focused on General Dynamics as part of broader discussions around U.S. defense spending and long term procurement...
